original text:
Let's talk temples! As we age, our temples begin to hollow due to natural fat and bone loss, often resulting in a sunken appearance. Our Nurse Injector Cheryl can reverse this effect by giving gentle volume to your temples with Juvéderm. . This month only, purchase a Temples package and your Brilliant Distinctions points balance will and applied towards your treatment. Plus you will receive: . 🔹 Two 1ML syringes of Juvéderm dermal filler 🔹 PLUS an additional 400 BD points! . You could save hundreds off your next treatment - contact us to take advantage!
The VI Peel process!! Call us today to schedule a consultation to get our peel information and see if you're a candidate! . . . 💆‍♀️Treatment: VI Peel 🔎 Why: VI Peels help reduce the appearance of sun damage, acne and acne scarring. VI Peels work on a cellular level to turn over skin and rejuvenate your face. ⏱ Time : 25-30 minutes 🤰: If you are pregnant or nursing you are not eligible for this treatment. 💊: If you are currently on Accutane, you are not eligible for this treatment. 💵 Price: $250 📍Location: Deux Rose Beauty Refinery 600 S. 6th Street LV 89101 📲 Call: 702-683-2831 to book 💻 Book online: deuxrose.com 🤳: Client gave their consent for this image to be posted. All images are taken by the staff of Deux Rose Beauty Refinery.

original text: Marion Pauw (1973) is an author, freelance writer, and copywriter. In 2005 she made ​​her debut with Villa Serena.Her final breakthrough to the general public was with Daylight (2008), which won the Golden Noose. Then she wrote the successful Sinner Child, Jetset, and her first novel, The Wilden. Jetset well as Sinner Child are filmed by NL Film. Daylight has been filmed by Eyeworks, starring top actors like Angela Drive, Fedja van Huet, and Monique van de Ven.

Daylight has been filmed by Eyeworks, starring top actors like Angela Drive, Fedja van Huet, and Monique van de Ven.

original text:
Pokemon Go Plus - Products - Kingway Industry Co., Ltd.
Pokémon GO Plus, the small wearable device that lets players interact with Pokémon GO without looking at their smartphone.
Compatible with both iOS and Android*, Pokémon GO Plus connects to smartphones via Bluetooth low energy and notifies players about nearby Pokémon and PokéStops. When a Pokémon is near, the device will vibrate and its LED will flash green**. Players can press the button on the device once close to throw a Poké Ball. A successful catch will result in the device flashing and vibrating.

Pokémon GO Plus, the small wearable device that lets players interact with Pokémon GO without looking at their smartphone.
Compatible with both iOS and Android*, Pokémon GO Plus connects to smartphones via Bluetooth low energy and notifies players about nearby Pokémon and PokéStops. original text:
The general sequence of events will included 4-wheeling adventures Monday, Wednesday and Friday. Tuesday provided each Syncronaut the opportunity to plan their own adventure, rest or repair their Syncro. Thursday afternoon 13 Syncronauts went on a two-hour Colorado River boat tour and others created their own recreation plan. Below is a general outline with overview information about the 4x4 routes planned.
BLM 378) from US 191 east toward Arches National Park. Along the way we saw various sights and encounter driving in a wash and over some rocky portions and a stop to see some dinosaur tracks.
After entering Arches National Park, we visited Eye of the Whale Arch and then had lunch and took optional hike to Delicate Arch. Then we headed further north to take an easy walk to see Landscape Arch and then doubled-back to see a few more sights before heading back to Camp Syncro.
​A day for hiking, biking, rest, relaxation or whatever suits you.
In the evening we had our legendary Taco Night.
After dinner we were treated with a presentation from guest speaker Sara Sidwell from the Museum of Moab. The topic was the history and development of the roads and trails in the Moab area.
Potash Road - Shafer Switchbacks - Dead Horse Point - Gemini Bridges.
A spectacular loop featuring some of the best sights in the region. We started by travelling west along the Colorado River and take Potash Road to Shafer Canyon Road and up the Shafer Switchbacks. From there we headed north, east and south to the spectacular viewpoint at Dead Horse Point to overlook the trail we'd taken earlier in the canyon below. After lunch there, it was north again to experience Gemini Bridges and the trail back toward the highway north of Moab.
Take an optional jet boat tour on the Colorado River with Moab Jett.
Two-hour boat tour with Moab Jett. Terrific!
Another amazing loop trim combining several cool places to visit. We started north of Moab and visited the well-preserved dinosaur tracks near Mill Canyon and then around Courthouse Rock on stretches of slickrock and loop back past Determination Towers. Travelling northwest we visited Tusher Tunnel for a short hike there and then on to Secret Spire. Secret Spire is one of the places we visited during Syncro Safari - Moab '98, so it's a bit of nostalgia to revisit the spot on the 20th Anniversary of Syncro Safari. After Secret Spire, we got to go down through the spectacular Long Canyon back to the highway.
